data.body: PASS 1 review (T3 — Integration feasibility, overlay): NOT-APPLICABLE / PASS. This cluster is a pure internal DRY consolidation onto the existing `src/rebar/_store/canonical.py` seam over already-used stdlib primitives (`json.dumps`, `hashlib.sha256`). No external API/CLI/service/library is integrated and no previously-unused capability is asserted; the overlay's anti-FP clause ("an internal, already-used integration is not-applicable") applies. No T3 findings.
